mapper.select: SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.getRcpCodeList */ Item_cd, item_nm from ( SELECT '' AS ITEM_CD, '-선택-' AS ITEM_NM, 0 seq FROM DUAL UNION select to_char(rate_key,'09') item_cd, rate_name item_nm ,rate_key seq from mcp_rate @dl_mcp order by 3)

SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.getRcpRateList */ GRP_ADDITION, TO_CHAR(A.ADDITION_KEY) ADDITION_KEY,ADDITION_NAME, NVL2(B.ADDITION_KEY,'Y',DECODE(CHARGE_FLAG,'F','Y','')) ADDITION_CHECKED, NVL(RANTAL, 0) RANTAL FROM ( SELECT CD_DSC GRP_ADDITION, ADDITION_KEY, ADDITION_NAME, A.RANTAL, CHARGE_FLAG FROM MCP_ADDITION@DL_MCP A, CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.CHARGE_FLAG=B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID='RCP9008' AND ACT_FLAG='Y' ORDER BY CHARGE_FLAG,ADDITION_KEY ) A, ( SELECT ADDITION_KEY FROM MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP A WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} ) B WHERE A.ADDITION_KEY = B.ADDITION_KEY(+)

REQ_CARD_YY = DECODE(#{reqCardYy}, 'null', '', #{reqCardYy}), REQ_CARD_MM = DECODE(#{reqCardMm}, 'null', '', #{reqCardMm}), REQ_WIRE_TYPE = DECODE(#{reqWireType}, 'null', '', #{reqWireType}), REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = DECODE(#{reqPayOtherFlag}, 'null', '', #{reqPayOtherFlag}), REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN = DECODE(#{reqPayOtherTelFn}, 'null', '', #{reqPayOtherTelFn}), REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN = DECODE(#{reqPayOtherTelMn}, 'null', '', #{reqPayOtherTelMn}), REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN = DECODE(#{reqPayOtherTelRn}, 'null', '', #{reqPayOtherTelRn}), PRNTS_BILL_NO = DECODE(#{billAcntNo}, 'null', '', #{billAcntNo}), RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* RcpMgmtMapper.insertRcpAddition */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, ADDITION_KEY, ADDITION_NAME, RANTAL ) SELECT #{requestKey} REQUEST_KEY, ADDITION_KEY, (SELECT ADDITION_NAME FROM MCP_ADDITION@DL_MCP WHERE ADDITION_KEY = A.ADDITION_KEY), NVL((SELECT RANTAL FROM MCP_ADDITION@DL_MCP WHERE ADDITION_KEY = A.ADDITION_KEY), 0) RANTAL FROM( SELECT SUBSTR ( ADDITION_KEY, DECODE (LEVEL, 1, 1, INSTR (ADDITION_KEY, ',', 1, LEVEL - 1) + LENGTH (',')), DECODE ( LEVEL, LENGTH (ADDITION_KEY) - LENGTH (REPLACE (ADDITION_KEY, ',', '')) + 1, LENGTH (ADDITION_KEY) + LENGTH (','), INSTR (ADDITION_KEY, ',', 1, LEVEL)) - DECODE (LEVEL, 1, 1, INSTR (ADDITION_KEY, ',', 1, LEVEL - 1) + LENGTH (','))) AS ADDITION_KEY FROM ( SELECT #{additionKey} ADDITION_KEY FROM DUAL) CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH (ADDITION_KEY) - LENGTH (REPLACE (ADDITION_KEY, ',', '')) + 1 ) A

/* RcpMgmtMapper.insertRcpMove */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, MOVE_COMPANY, MOVE_MOBILE_FN, MOVE_MOBILE_MN, MOVE_MOBILE_RN, MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, SYS_RDATE, REQ_GUIDE_FLAG, REQ_GUIDE_FN, REQ_GUIDE_RN, REQ_GUIDE_MN, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, MOVE_PENALTY ) VALUES ( DECODE(#{requestKey}, 'null','',#{requestKey}), DECODE(#{moveCompany}, 'null','',#{moveCompany}), DECODE(#{moveMobileFn}, 'null','',#{moveMobileFn}), DECODE(#{moveMobileMn}, 'null','',#{moveMobileMn}), DECODE(#{moveMobileRn}, 'null','',#{moveMobileRn}), DECODE(#{moveAuthType}, 'null','',#{moveAuthType}), DECODE(#{moveAuthNumber}, 'null','',#{moveAuthNumber}), DECODE(#{moveThismonthPayType}, 'null','',#{moveThismonthPayType}), DECODE(#{moveAllotmentStat}, 'null','',#{moveAllotmentStat}), DECODE(#{moveRefundAgreeFlag}, 'null','',#{moveRefundAgreeFlag}), SYSDATE, DECODE(#{reqGuideFlag}, '0', 'N', #{reqGuideFlag}), DECODE(#{reqGuideFn}, 'null','',#{reqGuideFn}), DECODE(#{reqGuideRn}, 'null','',#{reqGuideRn}), DECODE(#{reqGuideMn}, 'null','',#{reqGuideMn}), #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE, DECODE(#{movePenalty}, 'null','',#{movePenalty}) )
mapper.update: /* RcpMgmtMapper.updateRcpMove */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP SET MOVE_COMPANY = DECODE(#{moveCompany},'null','',#{moveCompany}) ,MOVE_MOBILE_FN = DECODE(#{moveMobileFn},'null','',#{moveMobileFn}) ,MOVE_MOBILE_MN = DECODE(#{moveMobileMn},'null','',#{moveMobileMn}) ,MOVE_MOBILE_RN = DECODE(#{moveMobileRn},'null','',#{moveMobileRn}) ,MOVE_AUTH_TYPE = DECODE(#{moveAuthType},'null','',#{moveAuthType}) ,MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER = DECODE(#{moveAuthNumber},'null','',#{moveAuthNumber}) ,MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE = DECODE(#{moveThismonthPayType},'null','',#{moveThismonthPayType}) ,MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT = DECODE(#{moveAllotmentStat},'null','',#{moveAllotmentStat}) ,MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG = DECODE(#{moveRefundAgreeFlag},'null','',#{moveRefundAgreeFlag}) ,REQ_GUIDE_FLAG = DECODE(#{reqGuideFlag}, '0', 'N', #{reqGuideFlag}) ,REQ_GUIDE_FN = DECODE(#{reqGuideFn},'null','',#{reqGuideFn}) ,REQ_GUIDE_RN = DECODE(#{reqGuideRn},'null','',#{reqGuideRn}) ,REQ_GUIDE_MN = DECODE(#{reqGuideMn},'null','',#{reqGuideMn}) ,RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId} ,RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE ,MOVE_PENALTY = DECODE(#{movePenalty},'null','',#{movePenalty}) WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* RcpMgmtMapper.insertRcpAgent */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN, MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, JRDCL_AGENT_NAME, JRDCL_AGENT_RRN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN, ENTRUST_REQ_NM, ENTRUST_RES_NM, ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, ENTRUST_RES_RRN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN, SYS_RDATE, MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( DECODE(#{requestKey}, 'null', '', #{requestKey}), DECODE(#{minorAgentName}, 'null', '', #{minorAgentName}), DECODE(#{minorAgentRrn}, 'null', '', #{minorAgentRrn}), DECODE(#{minorAgentTelFn}, 'null', '', #{minorAgentTelFn}), DECODE(#{minorAgentTelMn}, 'null', '', #{minorAgentTelMn}), DECODE(#{minorAgentTelRn}, 'null', '', #{minorAgentTelRn}), DECODE(#{minorAgentRelation}, 'null', '', #{minorAgentRelation}), DECODE(#{jrdclAgentName}, 'null', '', #{jrdclAgentName}), DECODE(#{jrdclAgentRrn}, 'null', '', #{jrdclAgentRrn}), DECODE(#{jrdclAgentTelFn}, 'null', '', #{jrdclAgentTelFn}), DECODE(#{jrdclAgentTelMn}, 'null', '', #{jrdclAgentTelMn}), DECODE(#{jrdclAgentTelRn}, 'null', '', #{jrdclAgentTelRn}), DECODE(#{entrustReqNm}, 'null', '', #{entrustReqNm}), DECODE(#{entrustResNm}, 'null', '', #{entrustResNm}), DECODE(#{entrustReqRelation}, 'null', '', #{entrustReqRelation}), DECODE(#{entrustResRrn}, 'null', '', #{entrustResRrn}), DECODE(#{entrustResTelFn}, 'null', '', #{entrustResTelFn}), DECODE(#{entrustResTelMn}, 'null', '', #{entrustResTelMn}), DECODE(#{entrustResTelRn}, 'null', '', #{entrustResTelRn}), SYSDATE, DECODE(#{minorSelfInqryAgrmYn}, 'null', '', #{minorSelfInqryAgrmYn}), DECODE(#{minorSelfCertType}, 'null', '', #{minorSelfCertType}), DECODE(#{minorSelfIssuExprDt}, 'null', '', #{minorSelfIssuExprDt}), DECODE(#{minorSelfIssuNum}, 'null', '', #{minorSelfIssuNum}), #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

/* RcpMgmtMapper.insertRcpState */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_STATE_KEY, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, OPEN_NO, MEMO, SYS_RDATE, RIP, RID, VIEW_FLAG, RES_NO, REQUEST_KEY, TB_CD, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{statusKey}, DECODE(#{requestStateCode}, 'null', '', #{requestStateCode}), DECODE(#{dlvryNo}, 'null', '', #{dlvryNo}), DECODE(#{openNo}, 'null', '', #{openNo}), DECODE(#{memo}, 'null', '', #{memo}), SYSDATE, DECODE(#{rip}, 'null', '', #{rip}), DECODE(#{rid}, 'null', '', #{rid}), 'Y', DECODE(#{resNo}, 'null', '', #{resNo}), DECODE(#{requestKey}, 'null', '', #{requestKey}), DECODE(#{tbCd}, 'null', '', #{tbCd}), #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

mapper.insert: /* RcpMgmtMapper.insertRcpPay */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, REQ_AC_TYPE, REQ_AC01_BALANCE, REQ_AC02_DAY, REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, SYS_RDATE, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( DECODE(#{requestKey }, 'null', '', #{requestKey }), DECODE(#{reqAcType }, 'null', '', #{reqAcType }), DECODE(#{reqAc01Balance },'null', '', #{reqAc01Balance }), DECODE(#{reqAc02Day }, 'null', '', #{reqAc02Day }), DECODE(#{reqAc01Amount }, 'null', '', #{reqAcAmount }), DECODE(#{reqAc02Amount }, 'null', '', #{reqAcAmount }), SYSDATE, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

mapper.insert: /* RcpMgmtMapper.insertRcpChange */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP ( NAME_CHANGE_NM, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN, NAME_CHANGE_RRN, NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, REQUEST_KEY, SYS_RDATE, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( DECODE(#{nameChangeNm}, 'null', '', #{nameChangeNm}), DECODE(#{nameChangeTelFn}, 'null', '', #{nameChangeTelFn}), DECODE(#{nameChangeTelMn}, 'null', '', #{nameChangeTelMn}), DECODE(#{nameChangeTelRn}, 'null', '', #{nameChangeTelRn}), DECODE(#{nameChangeRrn}, 'null', '', #{nameChangeRrn}), DECODE(#{nameChangePinstallment}, 'null', '', #{nameChangePinstallment}), DECODE(#{requestKey}, 'null', '', #{requestKey}), SYSDATE, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: /* RcpMgmtMapper.updateRcpChange */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP SET NAME_CHANGE_NM = DECODE(#{nameChangeNm}, 'null', '', #{nameChangeNm}), NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN = DECODE(#{nameChangeTelFn}, 'null', '', #{nameChangeTelFn}), NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN = DECODE(#{nameChangeTelMn}, 'null', '', #{nameChangeTelMn}), NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN = DECODE(#{nameChangeTelRn}, 'null', '', #{nameChangeTelRn}), NAME_CHANGE_RRN = DECODE(#{nameChangeRrn}, 'null', '', #{nameChangeRrn}), NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT = DECODE(#{nameChangePinstallment}, 'null', '', #{nameChangePinstallment}), RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* RcpMgmtMapper.insertRcpDvcChg */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, DVC_CHG_TYPE, DVC_CHG_RSN_CD, DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, DECODE(#{dvcChgType}, 'null', '', #{dvcChgType}), DECODE(#{dvcChgRsnCd}, 'null', '', #{dvcChgRsnCd}), DECODE(#{dvcChgRsnDtlCd}, 'null', '', #{dvcChgRsnDtlCd}), SYSDATE, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: /* RcpMgmtMapper.updateRcpDvcChg */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG@DL_MCP SET DVC_CHG_TYPE = DECODE(#{dvcChgType}, 'null', '', #{dvcChgType}), DVC_CHG_RSN_CD = DECODE(#{dvcChgRsnCd}, 'null', '', #{dvcChgRsnCd}), DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD = DECODE(#{dvcChgRsnDtlCd}, 'null', '', #{dvcChgRsnDtlCd}), REGST_DTTM = SYSDATE, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.select: SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.getNstepCallDataByRequestKey */ MQT.RES_NO , TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , MRCR.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME , TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER) AS CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER , TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER) AS CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER , TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN) AS CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN , MRCR.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , MQT.CSTMR_TYPE , MRSP.SOC_CODE , DECODE(NVL(MQT.PROD_TYPE, '01'), '02', (SELECT RPRS_PRDT_ID FROM CMN_INTM_MDL WHERE PRDT_CODE = MQT.REQ_USIM_NAME), MRSP.MODEL_ID) AS MODEL_ID /* 렌탈상품 유심모델 변경 */ , DECODE(MQT.OPER_TYPE, 'HDN3', 'HCN3', MQT.OPER_TYPE) AS OPER_TYPE , MRCR.CSTMR_NAME , MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_FN , MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_MN , MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_RN , MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN , MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN , MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , MRCR.CSTMR_MAIL , MRCR.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE , MRCR.CSTMR_ADDR , MRCR.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL , MRCR.CSTMR_POST , MQT.REQ_PAY_TYPE , MCE.CD_DSC AS REQ_BANK , TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) AS REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME , TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NO) AS REQ_CARD_NO , MRRQ.REQ_CARD_YY , MRRQ.REQ_CARD_MM , MRSP.JOIN_PRICE_TYPE , MRSP.USIM_PRICE_TYPE , MQT.REQ_WANT_NUMBER , MQT.REQ_WANT_NUMBER2 , MQME.MOVE_COMPANY , MQME.MOVE_MOBILE_FN , MQME.MOVE_MOBILE_MN , MQME.MOVE_MOBILE_RN , '' AS MOVE_AUTH_TYPE , '' AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER , DECODE(NVL(MQT.PROD_TYPE, '01'), '02', '', MQT.REQ_PHONE_SN) AS REQ_PHONE_SN /* 렌탈상품 단말일련번호 제외 */ , MQT.REQ_USIM_SN , MQT.AGENT_CODE , TO_CHAR(MQT.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQ_IN_DAY , MQT.CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG , MQT.CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG , MQT.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , MQT.CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG , TRIM(MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_RRN) AS MINOR_AGENT_RRN , MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_NAME , MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION , MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN , MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN , MRAT.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN , MQT.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , MRSP.MODEL_DISCOUNT1 , MQT.SPC_CODE --, MQT.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID , NVL(MQT.SHOP_CD,MQT.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID) AS CNTPNT_SHOP_ID , MRRQ.REQ_CARD_COMPANY , DECODE(NVL(MQT.PROD_TYPE, '01'), '02', 'UU', MQT.REQ_BUY_TYPE) AS REQ_BUY_TYPE /* 렌탈상품 유심단독 세팅 */ , MRCR.CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG , MRSP.MODEL_MONTHLY , MQME.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG , MQT.SERVICE_TYPE , MRRQ.REQ_CARD_NAME , TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN) AS REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN , TRIM(MRRQ.REQ_CARD_RRN) AS REQ_CARD_RRN , MRSP.ENGG_MNTH_CNT , TRIM(MRCR.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD , (CASE WHEN MQT.OPER_TYPE IN ('HCN3', 'HDN3') THEN (SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND SUBSCRIBER_NO = NVL(MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_FN || MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_MN || MRCR.CSTMR_TEL_RN, MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || MRCR.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) ) ELSE '' END) AS SVC_CNTR_NO , MQT.USIM_KINDS_CD , MRCR.SELF_CSTMR_CI , (SELECT ETC5 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2001' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = MQT.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE) AS ONLINE_ATHN_DIV_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP MQT , MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP MRAT , MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP MRCE , MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP MQME , MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP MRPT , MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP MRRQ , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP MRSP , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP MRDY , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP MRCR , CMN_GRP_CD_MST MCE WHERE MQT.REQUEST_KEY = #{value} AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRAT.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRCE.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MQME.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRPT.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRRQ.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRSP.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRDY.REQUEST_KEY AND MQT.REQUEST_KEY = MRCR.REQUEST_KEY AND MCE.GRP_ID(+) = 'RCP9009' AND MCE.CD_VAL(+) = MRRQ.REQ_BANK

SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.getRcpPlc */ X.PLCY_TYPE_CD AS PLCY_TYPE_CD /* 정책유형 */ , X.REQ_BUY_TYPE AS REQ_BUY_TYPE /* 구매유형 */ , DECODE(X.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', '단말구매', 'UU', '유심단독구매', '-') AS REQ_BUY_NAME /* 구매유형명 */ , X.ORGN_ID AS ORGN_ID /* 조직ID */ , X.ORGN_NM AS ORGN_NM /* 조직명 */ , X.SALE_PLCY_CD AS SALE_PLCY_CD /* 판매정책코드 */ , X.SALE_PLCY_NM AS SALE_PLCY_NM /* 판매정책명 */ , X.RATE_CD AS RATE_CD /* 요금제코드 */ , X.RATE_NM AS RATE_NM /* 요금제명 */ , X.PRDT_ID AS PRDT_ID /* 제품ID */ , X.PRDT_CODE AS PRDT_CODE /* 제품코드 */ , X.PRDT_NM AS PRDT_NM /* 제품명 */ , X.PRDT_IND_CD AS PRDT_IND_CD /*제품유형*/ , X.AGRM_TRM AS AGRM_TRM /* 약정기간 */ , X.OPER_TYPE AS OPER_TYPE /* 신청유형 */ , X.OPER_TYPE_NM AS OPER_TYPE_NM /* 신청유형명 */ , X.INST_NOM AS INST_NOM /* 할부 개월수 */ , DECODE(X.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', ROUND(X.HNDST_AMT / 1.1), 0) AS MODEL_PRICE /* 출고가(미포함) */ , X.HNDST_AMT /* 출고가(포함) */ , X.SUBSD_AMT AS MODEL_DISCOUNT2 /* 공시지원금(포함) */ , X.AGNCY_SUBSD_MAX AS MAX_DISCOUNT3 /* 대리점지원금(MAX)*/ , X.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT AS MODEL_DISCOUNT3 /* 대리점지원금 */ , X.INST_AMT AS REAL_MDL_INSTAMT /* 할부원금(포함) */ , X.INST_CMSN AS INST_CMSN /* 할부수수료 */ , ROUND( X.INST_AMT / DECODE(X.INST_NOM, 0, 1, X.INST_NOM) ) AS INST_MNTH_AMT /* 월단말요금 */ , ROUND( X.INST_AMT / DECODE(X.INST_NOM, 0, 1, X.INST_NOM) ) + X.INST_CMSN AS PAY_MNTH_AMT /* 월납부요금 */ , ( ROUND( X.INST_AMT / DECODE(X.INST_NOM, 0, 1, X.INST_NOM) ) + X.INST_CMSN ) * DECODE(X.INST_NOM, 0, 1, X.INST_NOM) AS HNDST_PAY_AMT /* 단말실구매가 */ , X.JOIN_PRICE AS JOIN_PRICE /* 가입비 */ , X.USIM_PRICE AS USIM_PRICE /* USIM비 */ , X.OLD_YN AS OLD_YN /* 중고여부 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0011', X.OLD_YN) AS OLD_YN_NM /* 중고여부 */ , X.MNFCT_ID AS MNFCT_ID /* 제조사ID */ , X.SPRT_TP , X.SPRT_TP_NM /* 지원금유형 */ , X.BASE_AMT /* 기본료 */ , X.DC_AMT /* 할인금액 */ , X.ADD_DC_AMT /* 추가할인금액 */ FROM ( SELECT #{reqBuyType} AS REQ_BUY_TYPE /* 구매유형 */ , SUBSD.ORGN_ID AS ORGN_ID /* 조직ID */ , OIM.ORGN_NM AS ORGN_NM /* 조직명 */ , PLCY.SALE_PLCY_CD AS SALE_PLCY_CD /* 판매정책코드 */ , PLCY.SALE_PLCY_NM AS SALE_PLCY_NM /* 판매정책명 */ , SUBSD.RATE_CD AS RATE_CD /* 요금제코드 */ , RATE.RATE_NM AS RATE_NM /* 요금제명 */ , SUBSD.PRDT_ID AS PRDT_ID /* 단말ID */ , MDL.PRDT_IND_CD AS PRDT_IND_CD /*단말유형*/ , MDL.PRDT_CODE AS PRDT_CODE /* 단말명 */ , MDL.PRDT_NM AS PRDT_NM /* 제품명 */ , SUBSD.AGRM_TRM AS AGRM_TRM /* 약정기간 */ , #{operType} AS OPER_TYPE /* 개통유형 */ , A.CD_DSC AS OPER_TYPE_NM /* 신청유형명 */ , #{instNom} AS INST_NOM /* 할부개월수 */ , NVL(SUBSD.HNDST_AMT, 0) AS HNDST_AMT /* 단말출고가(포함) */ , NVL(SUBSD.SUBSD_AMT, 0) AS SUBSD_AMT /* 공시지원금(포함) */ , NVL(SUBSD.AGNCY_SUBSD_MAX, 0) AS AGNCY_SUBSD_MAX /* 대리점지원금(MAX)*/ , NVL(SUBSD.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT, 0) AS AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT /* 대리점지원금 */ , CASE WHEN NVL(SUBSD.HNDST_AMT, 0) - ( NVL(SUBSD.SUBSD_AMT, 0) + NVL(SUBSD.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT, 0) ) <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE NVL(SUBSD.HNDST_AMT, 0) - ( NVL(SUBSD.SUBSD_AMT, 0) + NVL(SUBSD.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT, 0) ) END AS INST_AMT /* 할부원금(포함) */ , CASE WHEN TRUNC ( ( NVL(SUBSD.HNDST_AMT, 0) - ( NVL(SUBSD.SUBSD_AMT, 0) + NVL(SUBSD.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT, 0) ) ) * NVL( PLCY.INST_RATE, B.ETC1 ) / 100, -1 ) <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE TRUNC ( ( NVL(SUBSD.HNDST_AMT, 0) - ( NVL(SUBSD.SUBSD_AMT, 0) + NVL(SUBSD.AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT, 0) ) ) * NVL( PLCY.INST_RATE, B.ETC1 ) / 100, -1 ) END AS INST_CMSN /* 할부수수료 */ , CASE WHEN MDL.PRDT_IND_CD = '10' THEN (SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0053' AND CD_VAL = (SUBSD.OPER_TYPE || 'ESIM')) ELSE NVL(C.ETC1, 0) END AS JOIN_PRICE , CASE WHEN MDL.PRDT_IND_CD = '10' THEN (SELECT ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0053' AND CD_VAL = (SUBSD.OPER_TYPE || 'ESIM')) ELSE NVL(C.ETC2, 0) END AS USIM_PRICE
, MSPM.OLD_YN AS OLD_YN /* 중고여부 */ , MDL.MNFCT_ID AS MNFCT_ID /* 제조사ID */ , PLCY.SPRT_TP , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0058', PLCY.SPRT_TP) AS SPRT_TP_NM /* 지원금유형 */ , NVL(SUBSD.BASE_AMT, 0) AS BASE_AMT /* 기본료 */ , NVL(SUBSD.DC_AMT, 0) AS DC_AMT /* 할인금액 */ , NVL(SUBSD.ADD_DC_AMT, 0) AS ADD_DC_AMT /* 추가할인금액 */ , PLCY_TYPE_CD AS PLCY_TYPE_CD /* 정책유형 */ FROM MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST PLCY , MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST SUBSD , MSP_SALE_PRDT_MST MSPM , MSP_RATE_MST RATE , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST OIM , CMN_INTM_MDL MDL , CMN_GRP_CD_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , CMN_GRP_CD_MST C WHERE PLCY.CNFM_YN = 'Y' AND PLCY.SALE_PLCY_CD = SUBSD.SALE_PLCY_CD /* MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST 날짜 */ AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
AND REPLACE(#{reqInDay}, '-', '') || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS')
BETWEEN PLCY.SALE_STRT_DTTM AND PLCY.SALE_END_DTTM /* MSP_RATE_MST 날짜 */ AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND REPLACE(#{reqInDay}, '-', '')
BETWEEN RATE.APPL_STRT_DT AND RATE.APPL_END_DT /* CMN_INTM_MDL 날짜 */ AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND REPLACE(#{reqInDay}, '-', '')
BETWEEN NVL(MDL.PRDT_LNCH_DT,
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
REPLACE(#{reqInDay}, '-', '')
) AND MDL.PRDT_DT
AND PLCY.PLCY_SCTN_CD = DECODE(#{reqBuyType}, 'MM', '01', 'UU', '02') /* 구매유형, 필수 */
AND SUBSD.OPER_TYPE = #{operType} /* 신청유형, 필수 */
AND PLCY.NEW_YN = 'Y' /* 신청유형, 필수 */
AND PLCY.MNP_YN = 'Y' /* 신청유형, 필수 */
AND PLCY.HCN_YN = 'Y' /* 신청유형, 필수 */
AND PLCY.HDN_YN = 'Y' /* 신청유형, 필수 */
AND RATE.PAY_CL_CD = #{serviceType} /* 서비스구분, 필수 */
AND SUBSD.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} /* 제품ID, 필수 */
AND RATE.RATE_CD = #{socCode} /* 요금제, 필수 */
AND SUBSD.AGRM_TRM = #{agrmTrm} /* 약정기간, 필수 */
AND OIM.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} /* 조직ID, 선택 */
AND OIM.ORGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{orgnNm} || '%' /* 조직명, 선택 */
AND MSPM.OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부, 선택 */
AND PLCY.SPRT_TP = #{sprtTp} /* 지원금유형, 선택 */
AND SUBSD.SALE_PLCY_CD = MSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD AND SUBSD.PRDT_ID = MSPM.PRDT_ID AND SUBSD.RATE_CD = RATE.RATE_CD AND SUBSD.PRDT_ID = MDL.PRDT_ID AND SUBSD.ORGN_ID = OIM.ORGN_ID AND SUBSD.OPER_TYPE = A.CD_VAL AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0049' AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0051' AND B.CD_VAL = '20' AND C.GRP_ID = 'RCP0053' AND C.CD_VAL = (SUBSD.OPER_TYPE || PLCY.PRDT_SCTN_CD) ) X ORDER BY X.ORGN_NM, X.AGRM_TRM
SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.maxRequestkey */ SQ_RCP_REQUEST_KEY_01.NEXTVAL@dl_mcp AS requestkey, SQ_RCP_RES_NO_01.NEXTVAL@dl_mcp AS resNo FROM DUAL
SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.getShopCd */ ORGN_ID, KT_ORG_ID AS AGENT_CD FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{cntpntShopId} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.orgnInfo */ A.ORGN_ID, A.ORGN_NM, A.HGHR_ORGN_CD, B.ORGN_NM AS HGHR_ORGN_NM, A.TYPE_CD, A.FAX, A.TYPE_DTL_CD2 FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A, ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B WHERE A.HGHR_ORGN_CD = B.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId}

SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.selectRequest */ MR.FAXNUM AS faxnum ,MR.REQ_PHONE_SN AS reqPhoneSn ,MR.REQ_USIM_SN AS reqUsimSn ,MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN AS cstmrForeignerPn ,MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN AS cstmrForeignerRrn ,MRC.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN AS cstmrJuridicalRrn ,MRC.CSTMR_TEL_FN||'-'||MRC.CSTMR_TEL_MN||'-'||MRC.CSTMR_TEL_RN AS cstmrTel ,MRC.CSTMR_TEL_FN AS cstmrTelFn ,MRC.CSTMR_TEL_MN AS cstmrTelMn ,MRC.CSTMR_TEL_RN AS cstmrTelRn ,MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN||'-'||MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN||'-'||MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN AS cstmrMobile ,MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN AS cstmrMobileFn ,MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN AS cstmrMobileMn ,MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN AS cstmrMobileRn ,MRC.FATH_MOBILE_FN||'-'||MRC.FATH_MOBILE_MN||'-'||MRC.FATH_MOBILE_RN AS fathMobile ,MRC.FATH_MOBILE_FN AS fathMobileFn ,MRC.FATH_MOBILE_MN AS fathMobileMn ,MRC.FATH_MOBILE_RN AS fathMobileRn ,MRC.CSTMR_ADDR AS cstmrAddr ,MRC.CSTMR_MAIL AS cstmrMail ,MRC.CSTMR_NAME AS cstmrName ,MRC.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN AS cstmrNativeRrn ,MRC.CSTMR_JEJU_ID AS cstmrJejuId ,MRD.DLVRY_NAME AS dlvryName ,MRD.DLVRY_TEL_FN||'-'||MRD.DLVRY_TEL_MN||'-'||MRD.DLVRY_TEL_RN AS dlvryTel ,MRD.DLVRY_TEL_FN AS dlvryTelFn ,MRD.DLVRY_TEL_MN AS dlvryTelMn ,MRD.DLVRY_TEL_RN AS dlvryTelRn ,MRD.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN||'-'||MRD.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN||'-'||MRD.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN AS dlvryMobile ,MRD.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN AS dlvryMobileFn ,MRD.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN AS dlvryMobileMn ,MRD.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN AS dlvryMobileRn ,MRD.DLVRY_ADDR AS dlvryAddr ,MRD.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL AS dlvryAddrDtl ,MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME AS reqAccountName ,MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN AS reqAccountRrn ,MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS reqAccountNumber ,MRR.REQ_CARD_NAME AS reqCardName ,MRR.REQ_CARD_RRN AS reqCardRrn ,MRR.REQ_CARD_NO AS reqCardNo ,MRR.REQ_CARD_YY AS reqCardYy ,MRR.REQ_CARD_MM AS reqCardMm ,MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_FN||'-'||MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_MN||'-'||MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_RN AS moveMobile ,MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_FN AS moveMobileFn ,MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_MN AS moveMobileMn ,MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_RN AS moveMobileRn ,MRM.REQ_GUIDE_FN||'-'||MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN||'-'||MRM.REQ_GUIDE_RN AS reqGuide ,MRM.REQ_GUIDE_FN AS reqGuideFn ,MRM.REQ_GUIDE_RN AS reqGuideRn ,MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN AS reqGuideMn ,MRA.MINOR_AGENT_NAME AS minorAgentName ,MRA.MINOR_AGENT_RRN AS minorAgentRrn ,MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN||'-'||MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN||'-'||MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN AS minorAgentTel ,MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN AS minorAgentTelFn ,MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN AS minorAgentTelMn ,MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN AS minorAgentTelRn ,MRA.JRDCL_AGENT_RRN AS jrdclAgentRrn ,MRA.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN||'-'||MRA.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN||'-'||MRA.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN AS jrdclAgentTel ,MRA.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN AS jrdclAgentTelFn ,MRA.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN AS jrdclAgentTelMn ,MRA.JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN AS jrdclAgentTelRn ,MR.SO_CD AS soCd ,DECODE(MR.NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, 'Y', 1, 0) AS nwBlckAgrmYn ,DECODE(MR.APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, 'Y', 1, 0) AS appBlckAgrmYn ,DECODE(MR.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, 'Y', 1, 0) AS clauseJehuFlag ,MR.APP_CD AS appCd ,DECODE(MRC.SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, 'Y', 1, 0) AS InqryAgrmYn ,MRC.SELF_CERT_TYPE AS selfCertType ,MRC.SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT AS selfIssuExprDt ,MRC.SELF_ISSU_NUM AS selfIssuNum ,DECODE(MRA.MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, 'Y', 1, 0) AS minorSelfInqryAgrmYn ,MRA.MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE AS minorSelfCertType ,MRA.MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT AS minorSelfIssuExprDt ,MRA.MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM AS minorSelfIssuNum ,DECODE(MR.CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, 'Y', 1, 0) AS clauseFinanceFlag FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP MR, MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP MRC, MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP MRD, MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP MRR, MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP MRM, MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP MRA WHERE MR.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND MR.REQUEST_KEY = MRC.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MR.REQUEST_KEY = MRD.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MR.REQUEST_KEY = MRR.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MR.REQUEST_KEY = MRM.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MR.REQUEST_KEY = MRA.REQUEST_KEY(+)

SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.scanFileCount */ COUNT(T1.SCAN_ID) FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP T1, EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_MCP T2, EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP T3 WHERE T1.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND T1.SCAN_ID = T2.SCAN_ID AND T2.SCAN_ID = T3.SCAN_ID AND T2.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T3.USE_YN = 'Y'
/* rcpMgmtMapper.getRcpMgmtListLinkus */

SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.getRcpMgmtListLinkusDtl */ A.REQUEST_KEY , A.RES_NO , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID , FN_GET_ORGNM(A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID) AS AGENT_NAME , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9004', A.REQ_BUY_TYPE) AS REQ_BUY_NM , A.OPER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9001', A.OPER_TYPE) AS OPER_NAME , A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0006', A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE) REQUEST_STATE_NAME , A.SERVICE_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0013', A.SERVICE_TYPE) AS SERVICE_NAME , TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD') REQ_IN_DT , A.ON_OFF_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', NVL(A.ON_OFF_TYPE, '0')) ON_OFF_NM , A.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER , MDL.MNFCT_ID , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', ( SELECT MNFCT_NM FROM ORG_MNFCT_MST WHERE MNFCT_ID = MDL.MNFCT_ID ), '') AS MNFCT_NM , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', MDL.RPRS_PRDT_ID, '') AS PRDT_ID , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', MDL.PRDT_CODE, '') AS PRDT_CODE , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', MDL.PRDT_NM, '') AS MODEL_NAME , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', NVL(FN_GET_CODENM ('CMN0044', MDL.PRDT_COLR_CD), A.REQ_MODEL_COLOR), '') AS REQ_MODEL_COLOR , A.REQ_PHONE_SN , ( SELECT MNFCT_NM FROM ORG_MNFCT_MST WHERE MNFCT_ID = USIM.MNFCT_ID ) AS USIM_MNFCT_NM , USIM.PRDT_CODE AS USIM_ID , USIM.PRDT_NM AS USIM_NAME , A.REQ_USIM_SN , A.REQ_USIM_SN AS OLD_USIM_SN , A.SPC_CODE , A.MEMO AS REQUEST_MEMO , C.SOC_CODE , FN_GET_RATENM(C.SOC_CODE) AS SOC_NAME , A.CSTMR_TYPE , B.CSTMR_NAME , B.CSTMR_NAME AS CSTMR_NAME2 , B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME , B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME , B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN , B.CSTMR_TEL_MN , B.CSTMR_TEL_RN , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN AS CSTMR_TEL , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN AS CSTMR_MOBILE , B.CSTMR_POST , B.CSTMR_ADDR , B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL , B.CSTMR_MAIL , D.DLVRY_NAME , D.DLVRY_TEL_FN , D.DLVRY_TEL_MN , D.DLVRY_TEL_RN , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN || D.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN || D.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN AS DLVRY_MOBILE , D.DLVRY_POST , D.DLVRY_ADDR , D.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL , D.DLVRY_ADDR || ' ' || D.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL AS FULL_DLVRY_ADDR , D.DLVRY_ADDR_BJD , D.DLVRY_MEMO , E.TB_CD , E.DLVRY_NO , CASE WHEN A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE IN ('08', '09', '10') THEN TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE '' END DLV_DTTM , CASE WHEN A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE IN ('08', '09') THEN TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'HH24:MI:SS') ELSE '' END SET_DTTM , TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SYS_RDATE , FN_GET_USRNM(A.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_NM , TO_CHAR(A.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RVISN_DTTM , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP2035', A.USIM_KINDS_CD) AS USIM_KINDS_NM , A.PROD_NM AS DRCT_MNGM_PRDC_NM /* 직영상품명 */ FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP C , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP D , MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP E , CMN_INTM_MDL MDL , CMN_INTM_MDL USIM WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND A.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY AND C.MODEL_ID = MDL.PRDT_ID(+) AND A.REQ_USIM_NAME = USIM.PRDT_CODE(+) AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} ORDER BY A.REQUEST_KEY DESC
mapper.insert: /* rcpMgmtMapper.insertLinkusUsimMst */ INSERT INTO MSP_LINKUS_USIM_MST ( RES_NO, USIM_NO, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{resNo}, #{reqUsimSn}, #{SESSION_USER_ID}, SYSDATE )

/* rcpMgmtMapper.insertLinkusUsimHst */ INSERT INTO MSP_LINKUS_USIM_HST ( RES_NO, EVNT_SEQ, EVNT_TYPE,
USIM_NO,
OLD_USIM_NO,
REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, REGST_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{resNo}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(EVNT_SEQ)+1, 1) FROM MSP_LINKUS_USIM_HST WHERE RES_NO = #{resNo}), #{evntType},
#{reqUsimSn},
#{oldUsimSn},
#{SESSION_USER_ID}, SYSDATE, #{regstType} )
mapper.select: SELECT /* rcpMgmtMapper.setMcpRequestDlvryLinkus */ SQ_RCP_REQUEST_STATE_01.NEXTVAL@dl_mcp requestStateKey FROM DUAL
/* rcpMgmtMapper.getRcpMgmtRentalList */
/* rcpMgmtMapper.getRcpMgmtRentalListExcel */

/* rcpMgmtMapper.getCheckCstmr */ SELECT SUM(DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'C', 0, 1)) AS USG_CNT , SUM(DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'C', 1, 0)) AS TMNT_CNT , COUNT(*) AS TOT_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CUSTOMER_SSN = #{cstmrNativeRrn}

/* rcpMgmtMapper.getCheckCstmrList */ SELECT B.SUB_STATUS , B.CONTRACT_NUM , C.REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM , C.OPER_TYPE_NM , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', B.SUB_STATUS) AS STATUS_NM , B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(B.SUB_STATUS, 'A', '', SUBSTR(B.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8)) AS TMNT_DT FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_REQUEST_DTL C WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CUSTOMER_SSN = #{cstmrNativeRrn} ORDER BY B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE DESC

SELECT CST.CSTMR_NAME , DECODE(REQ.CSTMR_TYPE,'FN',CST.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN,CST.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , TRIM(MOV.MOVE_MOBILE_FN) || TRIM(MOV.MOVE_MOBILE_MN) || TRIM(MOV.MOVE_MOBILE_RN) AS MOVE_MOBILE , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'NSC' AND DTL_CD = MOV.MOVE_COMPANY) AS MOVE_COMPANY , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP2011', MOV.MOVE_AUTH_TYPE) AS MOVE_AUTH_TYPE , MOV.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER , REQ.MEMO AS REQUEST_MEMO , REQ.RES_NO FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP REQ , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP CST , MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP MOV WHERE REQ.REQUEST_KEY = CST.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = MOV.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND REQ.RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* RcpMgmtMapper.getKnoteYn */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A , MDS_ORG_CPNT_INFO B WHERE A.ORGN_ID = B.CPNT_ID AND A.HGHR_ORGN_CD = #{orgnId} AND B.FILE_NM = (SELECT MAX(FILE_NM) FROM MDS_ORG_CPNT_INFO) AND B.SALE_TYPE_DIV_CD IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0075' AND USG_YN = 'Y')

SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.getKnoteShopYn */ COUNT(A.ORGN_ID) CNT FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A, MDS_ORG_CPNT_INFO B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.ORGN_ID = B.CPNT_ID AND A.HGHR_ORGN_CD = #{agentCode} AND A.ORGN_ID = #{shopCd} AND B.FILE_NM = (SELECT MAX(FILE_NM) FROM MDS_ORG_CPNT_INFO) AND B.SALE_PATH_DIV_CD IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0076' AND USG_YN = 'Y')

SELECT DECODE((SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0077' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = #{agentCode}), NULL, 'N', 'Y') IS_NOT_AUTH_AGENT, SELF_CSTMR_CI FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2053' AND CD_VAL = 'FS5' AND USG_YN = 'Y'
SELECT KOS_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId} AND USG_YN = 'Y'

/* RcpMgmtMapper.getMcpReqDtl */ SELECT REQ.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , CSTMR_NAME AS cstmrName , DECODE( TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN), '', TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_FN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_MN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_RN), TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) ) AS cstmrMobile , SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(DECODE(REQ.CSTMR_TYPE, 'FN', TRIM(CST.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN), TRIM(CST.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN))), '-', ''), 0, 6) AS cstmrNativeRrn1 , SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(DECODE(REQ.CSTMR_TYPE, 'FN', TRIM(CST.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN), TRIM(CST.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN))), '-', ''), 7, 1) AS cstmrNativeRrn2 , SAL.SOC_CODE AS socCode , MOV.MOVE_COMPANY AS moveCompany , TRIM(MOV.MOVE_MOBILE_FN) || TRIM(MOV.MOVE_MOBILE_MN) || TRIM(MOV.MOVE_MOBILE_RN) AS moveMobile , SAL.MODEL_ID AS modelId , SAL.SPRT_TP AS sprtTp , CST.CSTMR_ADDR AS cstmrAddr , CST.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS cstmrAddrDtl , TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_FN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_MN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_RN) AS cstmrTel , DLV.DLVRY_TYPE AS dlvryType , DLV.DLVRY_ADDR AS dlvryAddr , DLV.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL AS dlvryAddrDtl , DLV.DLVRY_POST AS dlvryPost , TRIM(DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN) || TRIM(DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN) || TRIM(DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN) AS dlvryMobile , DLV.DLVRY_MEMO AS dlvryMemo , CST.RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD AS recommendFlagCd , CST.RECOMMEND_INFO AS recommendInfo FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP REQ , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP CST , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP SAL , MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP MOV , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP DLV WHERE 1 = 1 AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = CST.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = SAL.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = MOV.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = DLV.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
